description: Extra Datagrok viewers (Timelines, Chord, Sankey, Sunburst, Tree, Radar, Globe, Surface, Word Cloud, ...) built on ECharts, D3, and three.js
overview: Adds a suite of viewers on top of Datagrok's built-in set, built on
Adding a viewer: open a table, click the viewer gallery in the toolbox
(or View > Add Viewer), and pick one. Viewers respond to filters and
row selection the same way native viewers do.
Time: Timelines — SDTM-aware, auto-picks subject/start/end/term columns
for SDTM datasets, type-based heuristics otherwise.
Demos: each viewer has its own demo under Top Menu > Demo > Visualization
> General (Tree lives under Data Flow and Hierarchy). Each demo opens a
sample dataset and adds the viewer preconfigured.
